name: chart/funnel
description: Vertical conversion funnel — each stage is a trapezoid narrowing toward the next, with optional conversion labels.

meta.name: Funnel
meta.description: Vertical conversion funnel — each stage is a trapezoid narrowing toward the next, with optional conversion labels.

props.name: data
props.description: Ordered stages (descending): { id, label, value, color? }.

props.name: showConversion
props.description: Append each stage’s % of the first stage to its label.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no labels. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Signup conversion funnel
examples.code:
import { Funnel } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Funnel
  title="Signup funnel"
  showConversion
  data={[
    { id: 'visit', label: 'Visited', value: 8200 },
    { id: 'signup', label: 'Signed up', value: 3100 },
    { id: 'active', label: 'Activated', value: 1400 },
    { id: 'paid', label: 'Paid', value: 520 },
  ]}
/>

whenToUse: Showing drop-off across the ordered stages of a process (signup, checkout)
Communicating stage-to-stage conversion at a glance
whenNotToUse: Stages are not strictly decreasing — use BarChart
Showing a trend over time — use LineChart

related.name: BarChart
related.reason: Use when stages aren’t monotonically decreasing

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
